text: - ii. Enrolled Parties warrant to Owner that all information they submit to Owner or  to  the  OCIP  Administrator  shall  be  accurate  and  complete.  Enrolled Parties shall cooperate, and require all of its Enrolled Subcontractors of all tiers  to  cooperate  fully  with  the  OCIP  Administrator  and  the  insurance companies  providing  the  OCIP  Policies  (each  such  insurer  is  an  'OCIP Insurer'), as applicable, in its or their administration of the OCIP.
